summary: Completed testing of Error Trend Analytics feature in Agent Control Center. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components working - Trends tab with charts, time period selector, summary cards, and chart visualizations all functional.

issues: Console warning: Recharts chart dimensions showing as -1 initially - known Recharts issue with hidden containers, charts render correctly after tab is visible

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 analytics endpoints return proper data structures
GET /api/orchestrator/analytics/comprehensive returns summary, by_severity, by_category, by_source, by_agent, hourly_trend
Time period selector supports 6h, 12h, 24h, 48h, 72h, 168h as specified
Frontend properly fetches comprehensive analytics endpoint on tab load
Recharts library correctly renders AreaChart (timeline), PieChart (severity), BarChart (category)
Agent Performance section shows fix rates per agent
Error Sources section shows donut chart with source distribution
seed_data_creation: 22 live error events exist in database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Error Trend Analytics feature is fully functional. Navigate to Agent Control Center (in Marketing & AI sidebar section) > Trends tab. Summary shows Total Errors=22, Fixed=3, Fix Rate=13.6%, Critical=1. All charts render: Error Timeline (line/area), Errors by Severity (pie), Errors by Category (horizontal bar), Agent Performance (list with fix rates), Error Sources (donut). Time period selector works for all periods.

Backend API - GET /api/orchestrator/anal.details: Returns period_hours, summary (total_errors, total_fixed, fix_rate, critical_errors), by_severity, by_category, by_source, by_agent, hourly_trend
Returns period_hours, total_errors, by_severity array with severity, count, fixed, failed, fix_rate
Returns period_hours, total_errors, by_category array with category, count, fixed, failed, critical, high, fix_rate
Returns period_hours, by_source array with source, count, fixed, fix_rate
Returns period_hours, by_agent array with agent, agent_name, count, fixed, failed, fix_rate
Returns period_hours, timeline array with hour, display_hour, total, fixed, failed, critical, high, medium, low

Frontend - Trends tab visible in Agent C.details: Tab shows between Live Errors and Routing tabs with TrendingUp icon

Frontend - Time period selector (6h, 12h.details: Dropdown selector shows 'Last X hours' options, changes fetch analytics with new hours parameter

Frontend - Summary cards display.details: 4 colored cards: Total Errors (slate), Fixed (green), Fix Rate (blue), Critical (red) with gradient backgrounds

Frontend - Line chart for Error Timeline.details: Recharts AreaChart showing hourly error timeline with Total Errors, Fixed, Critical lines and legend

Frontend - Pie chart for Errors by Sever.details: Recharts PieChart showing severity distribution (low, medium, high, critical) with percentages

Frontend - Bar chart for Errors by Categ.details: Recharts horizontal BarChart showing categories (unknown, runtime, etc) with Fixed/Failed stacked bars

Frontend - Agent Performance section.details: List view showing each agent with errors handled count, fix rate badge, and fixed/failed counts

Frontend - Error Sources section.details: Recharts donut PieChart showing error sources (system, frontend, backend, user_reported)

Data Integrity - Totals consistency.details: Total errors consistent across comprehensive, by_severity, and by_category endpoints

Authentication - Endpoints require admin.details: All analytics endpoints return 403 without valid superadmin/admin token
